rules.one_line_intent: General self-help question about an NID online account showing locked/blocked and asking how to fix or unlock it, without retrial-after-correct-info details or asking an agent to do it.
Question about being unable to log in after a previous lock even when the user now enters correct information, often asking about waiting time or next retry.
must_have_concepts: ঠিক তথ্য দিয়েও ঢুকতে পারছি না

rules.one_line_intent: Direct service request asking support/agent to unlock the locked NID account now or perform NID download on the user’s behalf.

rationale: All three tags involve an NID online account being locked, so plain mentions of NID/account/lock are not enough. The boundary is the user’s framing: general troubleshooting belongs to account_locked; repeated failed login after later entering correct information or asking how long to wait belongs to account_locked_retrials; asking the recipient to unlock it now or download/do the task for the user belongs to account_locked_unlock_request.
